abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Head in the Clouds
abilities.text: Friendly models within 6" receive a (+) to Wp duels.

abilities.name: Recollimate
abilities.text: After a friendly model within 6" resolves an action, if it used The Stars Shift ability, it may move up to 3".

actions.name: Bounds of the Firmament
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 2" of the centerline or a table edge, make a Scheme marker within 1" of it.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Study of Anatomy
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. If the target is a friendly model instead of being dealt damage it heals 2.

triggers.name: Hole in the World
triggers.text: Place the target within 6" of its current location.

actions.name: Fallow Night
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemy models within (X)1" of the marker must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Light of Illios
triggers.text: Discard a (m). Of the schemes your opponent could have selected, they tell you one they did not choose.

triggers.name: Shade of Delios
triggers.text: Discard a (c). You may abandon your scheme without showing it to your opponent and immediately choose a new scheme from its next available schemes.
